ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wallets" (
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wallet */,
  "wallet_address" TEXT /* The wallet address */,
  "LSCP_score" REAL /* Liquidity Score and Confidence Prediction score */,
  "avg_month_pay" REAL /* Average monthly payment */,
  "LSCP_prob" REAL /* LSCP probability */,
  "MIDAS_max_prob" REAL /* Maximum Information Density and Average Score maximum probability */,
  "MIDAS_mean_prob" REAL /* MIDAS mean probability */,
  "payWeight" INTEGER /* Payment weight */,
  "combined_prob" REAL /* Combined risk probability */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the wallet was created */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last transaction or activity in the wallet */,
  "wallet_type" TEXT /* Type of wallet (e.g., hot wallet, cold wallet) */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the wallet (could be an individual or an organization) */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the wallet has been verified */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Overall risk level of the wallet (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wallet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the risk model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON object containing parameters used by the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wallet making the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "receiver_wallet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the receiving wallet (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_receiver_wallet_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_wallet_id") REFERENCES wallets ("wallet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_wallet_id FOREIGN KEY ("wallet_id") REFERENCES wallets ("wallet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk score entry */,
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wallet */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the risk model used */,
  "score" REAL /* The risk score calculated */,
  "probability" REAL /* The probability associated with the risk score */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was calculated */,
  "score_period" TEXT /* Period over which the score was calculated (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_scores_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES risk_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_scores_wallet_id FOREIGN KEY ("wallet_id") REFERENCES wallets ("wallet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set up the alert */,
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wallet */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Risk threshold for the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was set up */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high risk, suspicious activity) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_wallet_id FOREIGN KEY ("wallet_id") REFERENCES wallets ("wallet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wallet */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., risk assessment, transaction history) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_wallet_id FOREIGN KEY ("wallet_id") REFERENCES wallets ("wallet_id")
)
